name: Vidal Fizzy Gum Bullets (SINGLE ONE)
description:
Vidal Fizzy Gum Bullets – A Burst of Fizzy Fun in Every Chew!

Get ready for a chewy, fizzy surprise with Vidal Fizzy Gum Bullets, now available at Sweets World! These colourful little bullets may look small, but they’re packed with fruity flavour and a fizzy kick that makes them extra fun to chew.

Each Vidal Fizzy Gum Bullet has a crunchy candy shell with a soft, chewy gum centre and a fizzy twist that tingles your taste buds. The fruity flavours are bold, sweet, and super satisfying – perfect for anyone who loves gum with a little extra pop!

Great for sharing with friends, adding to lolly bags, or keeping in your snack drawer for a quick treat, Vidal Fizzy Gum Bullets are a favourite among kids and adults alike. Their bright colours and fizzy fun make them ideal for parties, road trips, or just enjoying any time of day.

At Sweets World, we bring you the most exciting and tasty treats from around the globe, and Vidal Fizzy Gum Bullets are one of our top picks for gum lovers looking for something a little different.

So why not try something fizzy, fruity, and fun? Grab a pack of Vidal Fizzy Gum Bullets today and enjoy a sweet experience that’s bursting with flavour!
